structural_setups.summary: NQ requires explicit ES-relative confirmation before any query-ready read-model state is surfaced.
structural_setups.description: Fixture-safe NQ profile foundation using explicit NQ and ES anchors with deterministic relative-strength gating.

query_triggers.description: Trigger only when NQ touches the plan level, completed bars confirm, and NQ is stronger than ES from explicit anchors.

warnings: Absolute NQ price action is not sufficient when ES-relative confirmation is required.
Missing NQ or ES anchors must keep the read model blocked.
